name: Claude Sonnet 4
description: Anthropic's balanced model in the Claude 4 family. Excels at agentic tasks, coding, and analysis. Strong instruction-following with extended context window.
curator_note: Best-in-class for agentic pipelines in 2026; computer-use ready.

name: Claude Opus 4
description: Anthropic's most capable model. Top-tier reasoning, research synthesis, and complex multi-step agentic workflows.
curator_note: Use when task complexity justifies cost. Unmatched on long-horizon reasoning.

name: Llama 4 Scout
description: Meta's efficient open-weight model with 10M token context. Ideal for local deployment, RAG systems, and cost-sensitive production workloads.
curator_note: The go-to open model for 2026 — 10M context is a game changer for RAG.

name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
description: Google DeepMind's top multimodal model. Excels at video understanding, code generation, and scientific reasoning with native tool use.
curator_note: Best for video + code tasks. Competes directly with Claude Opus on benchmarks.

name: DeepSeek R2
description: DeepSeek's open reasoning model. Chain-of-thought specialist with strong math, science, and code benchmarks at significantly lower cost.
curator_note: Unprecedented cost/performance ratio for reasoning tasks. Critical for cost-sensitive agentic pipelines.
